calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Off Calendar

Defendant Protective Life Insurance Company'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT PROTECTIVE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY Defendant Protective Life Insurance Company'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims.

Appearances:

Terrence J. Coleman, Esq., in person, PILLSBURY & COLEMAN, LLP, (415) 433-8000, for Plaintiff, MAYWELL INONG, D.D.S.

CHARLES K. CHINEDUH, Esq., via Zoom, MAYNARD NEXSEN LLP, (310) 596-4500, for Defendant PROTECTIVE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY.

JACK C. NICK, Esq., via Zoom, (213) 269-6173, for Defendant Ricardo Lara as Commissioner of the California Department of Insurance.

Ruling - A R G U E D. Upon the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR: 10619, T: (925) 226-8222, E: raquel@transcriptlegal.com. (302/RBU)

***After Hearing: An order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Joinder Of Defendant Ricardo Lara As Commissioner Of The California Department Of Insurance To Protective Life Insurance Companys Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT RICARDO LARA Joinder As Commissioner Of The California Department Of Insurance To Protective Life Insurance Companys Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims.

Appearances:

Terrence J. Coleman, Esq., in person, PILLSBURY & COLEMAN, LLP, (415) 433-8000, for Plaintiff, MAYWELL INONG, D.D.S.

CHARLES K. CHINEDUH, Esq., via Zoom, MAYNARD NEXSEN LLP, (310) 596-4500, for Defendant PROTECTIVE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY.

JACK C. NICK, Esq., via Zoom, (213) 269-6173, for Defendant Ricardo Lara as Commissioner of the California Department of Insurance.

Ruling - A R G U E D. Upon the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR: 10619, T: (925) 226-8222, E: raquel@transcriptlegal.com. (302/RBU)
